Original_Definition: ဇုက်လာဲအာဟွံသေၚ်ထပိုတ်လဝ်ကဵုမြရောၚ် (v) the rope did not break, you can see it was cut with a knife.

English: You can see it was cut with a knife.    ဍေံဂှ်ကောန်ကောကောန်ဒေံကဵုအဲဏောၚ်  he is my cousin after.    ဍေံနွံပ္ဍဲဖျာဏောၚ်  he will be in the market
Original_Definition: 1 (ps) particle of future, inferential or limited assertion. [id] ဏောၚ်၊ တၞောၚ်။    အဲကၠုၚ်ဏောၚ် (ps) I will come.    အဲဏောၚ်ဗလးလဝ်ၝ (ps) it was I, who let you out.    အဲမၞိဟ်တၟိသက်သက်ဏောၚ် (ps) I am a complete new comer here.    အဲသ္ဒးအာသွက်ဗှ်ေဏောၚ် (ps) I shall have to go for your sake, I suppose.    ဣဗြဴဏံဗြဴယှုက်ယှုက်ထုဲထုဲဏောၚ် (ps) she has the reputation of being a woman without regard for the proprieties.    ကောန်အဲဏောၚ်လေဝ်ဣဏံဂှ် (ps) this must be my son.    ဇုက်လာဲအာဟွံသေၚ် ထပိုတ်လဝ်ကဵုမြဏောၚ် (ps) the rope did not break, you can see it was cut with a knife.    ဍေံဂှ်ကောန်ကောကောန်ဒေံကဵုအဲဏောၚ် (ps) he is my cousin after.    ဍေံနွံပ္ဍဲဖျာဏောၚ် (ps) he will be in the market, I imagine he is in the market.    သၟိၚ်တံစဳရေၚ်ပေဲါရုဲမာဲဏောၚ် (ps) the government will hold elections.    သြန်ဏံအဲရန်တၟံလဝ်ကဵုသၚ်ဏောၚ် (ps) I shall assign this money to the monks.    ၝဏံကောန်တၠတသိုက်ဏောၚ်ဒှ် (ps) I ma sure he is some rich man’s son. [Cf.] ရ၊ ရောၚ်။

English: You can see it was cut with a sword.    ညိဟွံသေၚ်  in no small degree.    ဍေံရဲရေဝ်အဲထေၚ်၊ ဟွံသေၚ်  he is from rie
Original_Definition: 1 (v) {usually neg. not} to be the case. {1} negating nominal sent or (v) in adverbial construction or rejecting proposition.    ဣဏံပလောံအဲဟွံသေၚ် (v) this is not my shirt.    ကောန်ပၞာန်ဟွံသေၚ် (v) he is not a soldier.    ဇုက်လာဲအာဟွံသေၚ် ထပိုတ်လဝ်ကဵုမြဏောၚ် (v) the rope did not give way, you can see it was cut with a sword.    ညိဟွံသေၚ် (adv) in no small degree.    ဍေံရဲရေဝ်အဲထေၚ်၊ ဟွံသေၚ် (v) he is from Rie, I believe, he is not.    တဴရဴလျးဂှ်ထဝ်ဖ္အိုတ်ဟွံသေၚ် (v) not every shining thing is gold. {2} (ဟွံ)သေၚ်ဟာ inviting support of statement.    ညးဂှ်ဇမၞော်ကွာန်သေၚ်ဟာ (v) he is the headman, isn't he?

English: You can see it was cut with a sword.    ဍုၚ်တြေံဂမၠိုၚ်တေံလာဲလေၚ်အိုတ်  those old cities have vanished utterly.    ထၟိၚ်က္ဍိုပ်ဗှ်ေလာဲဒၟံၚ်  your turban is coming undone.    လိုဟ်လာဲ  to come undone.  ကယျာ၊ ကွာ၊ ခညောံ၊ လး။     တလာဲ  to come loose
Original_Definition: 1 (v) to dissolve, be dissolved, to come to loose united, to part, give way.    အိုဟ်လာဲအာ (v) to waste away.    ဂဥုဲလာဲအိုတ်ရဟာ (v) has alll medicine dissolved.    ဂၠိက်ဍေံလာဲစှ်ေ(ဟ်) (v) his waist cloth fell down.    ဇုက်လာဲအာဟွံသေၚ်ထပိုတ်လဝ်ကဵုမြဏောၚ် (v) the rope did not give way, you can see it was cut with a sword.    ဍုၚ်တြေံဂမၠိုၚ်တေံလာဲလေၚ်အိုတ် (v) those old cities have vanished utterly.    ထၟိၚ်က္ဍိုပ်ဗှ်ေလာဲဒၟံၚ် (v) your turban is coming undone.    လိုဟ်လာဲ(ယ်) (v) to come undone. [Cf.] ကယျာ၊ ကွာ၊ ခညောံ(အ်)၊ လး။    [Der.] တလာဲ(ယ်) (v) to come loose, to unbind.    ပၠာဲ(ယ်) (v) dissolve.    ဗလာဲ(ယ်) (v) loosen.

English: You can see it was cut with a sword.    ဍုၚ်တြေံဂမၠိုၚ်တေံလာဲလေၚ်အိုတ်  those old cities have vanished utterly.    ထၟိၚ်က္ဍိုပ်ဗှ်ေလာဲဒၟံၚ်  your turban is coming undone.    လိုဟ်လာဲ  to come undone.  ကယျာ၊ ကွာ၊ ခညောံ၊ လး။     တလာဲ  to come loose

English: You can talk later.    အဲစၟဳမံၚ်ဗှ်ေလံကွေံရ လၟုဟ်မှဗှ်ေစိုပ်   i have been waiting for you a long time and you have only just got here.    ညာတ်မှပတှ်ေ   believe only what you see.  ဆ၊ မွဲ။
Original_Definition: 2 (p) (n) only.    အရေဝ်ဗှ်ေစွံလဝ်ကၠာလက်ကရဴမှဟီု(မ်) (p) (n) stop your chatter for now, you can talk later.    အဲစၟဳမံၚ်ဗှ်ေလံကွေံရ လၟုဟ်မှဗှ်ေစိုပ် (p) (n) I have been waiting for you a long time and you have only just got here.    ညာတ်မှပတှ်ေ(ဟ်) (p) (n) believe only what you see. [Cf] ဆ၊ မွဲ(ယ်)။

English: You can tease him as much as you like and he never get annoyed
Mon: စိုတ်ဂၠိၚ်
Original_Definition: မၞိဟ်ဏံဂလိုၚ်လဵုထ္ဍုတ်ထ္ဍုတ်ဟွံထေဲ စိုတ်ဂၠိၚ်ကွေံ (n) he is most easygoing, you can tease him as much as you like and he never get annoyed.

English: You can.    ဓဝ်ဒေါသဂှ်ပလေဝ်ဍေံမာန်မ္ဂးဟွံဒှ်သေက်ဇဵုညးသ္ကံရ  if anger could be abolished
Original_Definition: 3 (v) to win, to beat.    ညးဂှ်မာန်ရော (v) who won?    ညးမွဲဟွံမာန်ဍေံ(ဟ်) (v) no one could beat her.    ဟွံမာန်ဇြဟတ်ကၠဂှ်(ဟ်) (v) his strength was no match for that of the tiger. As, [va.] occasionally combined with {ဂွံ(အ်)} to be able to, esp. to be physically capable of, free from impediment.    အဲမိက်ဂွံဟီုအရေဝ်ကဵုသၟိၚ်ဇၞော်မွဲစုတ် ကဵုအခေါၚ်ကဵုအဲမာန်ဟာ (v) may I have Your Honor's permission to speak to you for a moment?    ဍေံထ္ၜၚ်လျိူၚ်မသုန်စှော်ပသာမာန် (v) he can lift a weight of fifty viss.    တန်ဒှ်တိတ်မာန်လေဝ်တိတ်မာန်ဏောၚ် (v) perhaps it will be possible for it to be produced.    တ္ၚဲဏံဗှ်ေမိက်ဂွံကၠောန်မ္ဂးကၠောန်မာန်ရ (v) if you want to do it today, you can.    ဓဝ်ဒေါသဂှ်ပလေဝ်ဍေံမာန်မ္ဂးဟွံဒှ်သေက်ဇဵုညးသ္ကံရ (v) if anger could be abolished, there would be no strife.    ဗှ်ေအာအတေံမာန်ဟာ (v) are you free to go there?    ရံၚ်တ္ၚဲတုဲတီအခိၚ်မာန်ဟာ (v) can you tell the time by sun?    ရန်ကဵုဒ္ဂေတ်ဍေံပရေံတုဲဍေံမၞိဟ်ခိုဟ်မွဲဟွံသေၚ်ဂှ်တီမာန်ရ (v) if you consider the defects of his conduct you can see he is not a good person.    လ္ပကွာ်ပြဟ်အဲဗက်ဟွံမာန် (v) do not work so fast, I cannot keep up with you.    ၜိုတ်ဗှ်ေစမာန်ဂှ်စညိ (v) eat as much as you can. [Cf.] ဇၞး။ [va.] ဂွံ(အ်)၊ လာပ်။ [opp.] ကျ။

English: You could not get a knife into him
Original_Definition: မၞိဟ်ဏံဒုၚ်ဗာ်ကဵုမြဟွံလုပ် (v) he is a tough fellow, you could not get a knife into him.

English: You dare not answer him back at all
Original_Definition: မၞိဟ်ဏံစိုတ်တ္ၚံက်ကွေံဟီုဗျိဒးညိဟွံဂွံ(အ်) (v) this chap is easily put out of temper, you dare not answer him back at all.
ဇကုသ္ပ စုတ်ကဵုအဲသွက်ဂွံတကိုတ်တ္ၚဵု (v) you give me a shock.

English: You go ahead then i will follow on
Original_Definition: ဗှ်ေအာကၠာ ကာလတုဲအဲဗက်ကၠုၚ် (n) you go ahead then I will follow on.
ဗှ်ေအာစၞးအဲ(ယ်) (n) you go instead of me.
မၞးအာစၞးအဲ (n) you go instead of me.

English: You had better feed him.  ကောန်ၚာ်ဗျဵုတှ်ဟာဟွံတီ ဂၟဴကဵုဍေံတှ်ညိ။  ဗၟဴ၊ ဂၟဴ။  မဴ  to suck
Original_Definition: ကောန်ၚာ်ထၚ်တှ်ဟာဟွံတီ ဂၠဴထောံဍေံတှ်ညိ (v) I think the baby may be hungry, you had better feed him. [id] ကောန်ၚာ်ဗျဵုတှ်ဟာဟွံတီ ဂၟဴကဵုဍေံတှ်ညိ။ [Cf.] ဗၟဴ၊ ဂၟဴ။ [Der.] မဴ (v) to suck.

English: You had better feed him.  ဂၟဴ။  မဴ  to suck
Original_Definition: ကောန်ၚာ်ဗျဵုထၚ်တှ်ဟာဟွံတီဗၟဴထောံဍေံတှ်ညိ (v) I think the baby may be hungry, you had better feed him. [Var.] ဂၟဴ။ [Der.] မဴ (v) to suck.

English: You have gone past our house
Original_Definition: ဗှ်ေအာသှာတ်အာသ္ၚိပိုဲ (v) you have gone past our house.
ဗှေ်ကၠာဲအဓိပ္ပဲါဗၠေတ်အိုတ်တးဣရ (v) you have mistranslated completely.
ဇကုစပုၚ်အောန် (n) you have not eaten much!

English: You have not weaned your youngest child yet
Original_Definition: ကောန်ဒဒေံဗှ်ေဟွံဒပိုတ်တှ်ဏီသေၚ်ဟာ (v) you have not weaned your youngest child yet, have you?

English: You have put in an awful lot of blue.  စုတ်လဝ်မာဲဂၠိုၚ်လောန်အာ။
Original_Definition: (v) you have put in an awful lot of blue. [id] စုတ်လဝ်မာဲဂၠိုၚ်လောန်အာ။

English: You must do what you are told
Mon: မၞးသ္ဒးကၠောန်ဗီုဟီုလဝ်ဂှ်
Original_Definition: (pron) you must do what you are told.
ဗှ်ေဟဂွံလုက်ဣဂှ်(ဟ်) (pv) you must not touch that.
ဗှ်ေဟွံဂွံလုက်ဣဂှ်(ဟ်) (pv) you must not touch that.

English: You need have no doubts about him.  အထောတ်၊ တၞောတ်၊ သၠုၚ်။  တူ  to be superior
Original_Definition: လ္ပသၠေဟ်ပၟာလ္တူဍေံညိ (prep) you need have no doubts about him. [Cf.] အထောတ်၊ တၞောတ်၊ သၠုၚ်။ [Der.] တူ (v) to be superior.

English: You need not pay.  second sense
Original_Definition: ဇကုဟွံသ္ဒးစိုတ် ဇကုလ္ပကဵုသၠုဲ(ယ်) (n) if you do not like it, you need not pay. [Cf.] second sense, ပဆာန်၊ သြန်။

English: You ought to repay your parents care
Original_Definition: မၞးဂပ်ဂပ်ခၠေဝ်ဂုန်မိမ (v) you ought to repay your parents care.

2 (n) [colloq] တၟာ [id.] equal quantity or degree, as much as.   ကောန်ဇကုတံဂှ်တၟာလဵုရော (n) how old are your sons?   ကွာန်ဏံအဲဟွံစိုပ်တၟာဂလံရ (n) I have not visited this village for a long time.   ဇၞော်တၟာလဵုရော (n) how big is it?   သ္ၚိဏံဇၞော်တၟာဘာ (n) a house as big as the school. [Cf.] ဂလိုၚ်၊ ၜိုတ်။ [Var.] တၟာ (n) မာ။   တၟာဂလိုၚ် (n) {in quantity} much, plenty.   တၟာဂလံ(အ်) (n) duration, long.   တၟာသၞေံတဲသ အာဗှ်ေချိုတ် (n) if so much as one of his finger-nails is damaged, you shall die.

English: You shoot very straight.  က္ဍၚ်၊ ဍၚ်။
Original_Definition: ဗှ်ေပှ်ောလ္ဂဍာံ(မ်) (adv) you shoot very straight. [Cf.] က္ဍၚ်၊ ဍၚ်။

English: You should beat down the price before you buy. ကၠာ  time before
Original_Definition: အကၠာမၞးဟွံရာန်သ္ဒးသ္ဂုတ်ၚ္ၚုဟ်ေထက် (n) you should beat down the price before you buy.[Der.] ကၠာ (n) time before.

English: You should do it that way
Original_Definition: ဗီုဏံမၞးဟွံဂပ်ဂဝ်သ္ပ (v) you should do it that way.

English: You should enter him as a novice ဇကုဇၞော်နူအဲမသုန်သၞာံ  you are five years older than me. ဇြဟတ်ဇၞော်  to have great strength
Original_Definition: (v) {colloq} to be large, great, full-grown, adult, old. [id] ဇၞော်။ အ္စာဇၞော် (n) headmaster. အမာတ်ဇၞော် (n) prime minister.    ကောဇၞော် (n) elder brother. ကောန်ၚာ်ဇၞော်ပြဟ် (v) the child is growing fast. ကောန်ဗှ်ေဂှ်ဇၞော်ရပ္တိုန်ထောံထပိုဲညိ (v) your son is growing up, you should enter him as a novice ဇကုဇၞော်နူအဲမသုန်သၞာံ (v) you are five years older than me. ဇြဟတ်ဇၞော် (v) to have great strength, be strong. ဝုတ်ဇၞော် (n) old maid. သ္ၚိဇၞော် (n) large house. [Cf.] ဗျု၊ သၠဲ။ [opp.] ဍေတ်။ [Der.] ဇမၞော် (n) chief. ဇၞော် (n) size. ဇၞော်ပြဟ် (v) to grow quicly. ဇၞော်မောဝ်ပြဟ် (v) to grow to maturity.
